samples.xml_description:
Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz. Input clock signal. Reset signal. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. CLK_50 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. CLK_10 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. CLK_1 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100. CLK_50 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2. CLK_10 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10. CLK_1 - Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.

Reset the counter when RST is active.

Toggle the output clock signals when the corresponding counter reaches the specified value.
